headline: Affiliated Managers to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AMG reports Q1 2026 results on May 1. Expectations indicate higher earnings and revenues, with HighBrook added and EBITDA guided at $310-$330M.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Invesco, Raises Price Target to $28

headline: Invesco Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) executives said the firm delivered another quarter of organic growth despite a volatile market backdrop, highlighting strong net inflows, improving profitability and continued investment in product innovation and technology.
